category_sources: source_facts.description says nemu is an ncurses UI for QEMU; source_facts.homepage is the official nemuTUI repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nemu; official repository path and homepage use nemu.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface for this project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/nemuTUI/nemu, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ncurses UI for QEMU; source_facts.executables lists nemu and ntty.
